contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Observing the strengthening of two signals today while over at Dennis’s place with @⁨Kirsten Ritschel⁩ to observe their commercial kitchen 
  
  https://agroverse.shop/partners/shiok-kitchen-menlo-park/index.html
  
  *Signal 1:* this is the second someone approach regarding importing pepper first time was Ray Wu (_whose introduced @⁨June Jo Jo Lee⁩ who then introduced @⁨Kirsten Ritschel⁩_) when he asked last year about bringing in specialty pepper from Taiwan. Dennis mentioned his wife’s home town in Pohnpei Island. They produce Pohnpei pepper it is limited in production quantity and is wondering how to utilize our distribution network and packaging facility for this
  
  *Signal 2:* small household farms having limited access to international market. Same category of problem which we have been tackling with the small household farmers in Brazil. The government running Pohnpei island has tried quite a few initiative to improvement the livelihood of the folks living on the island but most of it fizzle out since the usually economic model doesn’t work or self sustain.
  
  *_Signal 3:*_ surfacing of state levels actors. Started seeing more state level or state level adjacent folks organically surfacing on the radar. When I offered to handle the FDA FSVP certification for the farm he mentioned the farmers don’t really have a registered entity. He mentioned father in law who is a banker on the island is connected with the state government will be in town and will make the introduction when he is in town. 
  
  Likely the FDA FSVP certification when done will be done on a state level enterprise 
  
  Given what I observed the knowledge bank of the LLMs recently. I will probably just be pass it the details and our existing templates with the cacao and have it draft a set for the Pohnpei pepper
  
  Also since Dennis already has a restaurant running. Basically suggested that he clear a section near the checkout counter where consignment based produce like the Pohnpei pepper and our cacao can be put on display 
  
  _PS: Coincidentally the spot where I suggested to have the produce made available for display is currently occupied by the Buddha statues. Didn’t realize he had Buddha statues the last time I visited when the restaurant just reopen…🤔🤷_
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: IMG_1648.png
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/contribution_20260522043031_gary_teh_img_1648.png
